body: Trying to make things a little simpler
title: Remove unused args from atmos_surface_conditions

body: There is no reason for SG_quad to be in AtmosCache: it is constant and is firmly attached to a specific function.
title: Move SG_quad out of cache

body:
Add exponentially decaying with height diffusion `DecayWithHeightDiffusion`

The `DecayWithHeightDiffusion` works with the `Coupler` (at least for the one AMIP configuration that I have been testing), so I thought it would be good to switch to using it in `Atmos` by default. But lmk if you would prefer to keep more cases with `FriersonDiffusion` cc @szy21 , @akshaysridhar 


Also, I'm not sure if what I did in `src/parameters/create_parameters.jl` is the most elegant option. I didn't want to add `H` and `D₀` on top of `C_E` parameter because we will need either the first two or the `C_E` parameter. Never the three at the same time. cc @nefrathenrici 

Also, also, would it be ok to not define any fields for the vertical diffusion `structs` in `src/solver/model_getters.jl`? And instead just grab the parameters from the `params` `structs` when needed? Not sure what is the benefit of one option vs the other? cc @nefrathenrici
title: Add exponentially decaying with height diffusion option
